metadata.source: Web research aggregation (Financer, HypeAuditor, Modash, Collabstr, Amra&Elma, Favikon, StarNgage)
metadata.notes: Follower counts are approximate and reflect publicly available data as of Q1 2026. ETF relevance scored 1-10 based on frequency of ETF-specific content.

influencers.name: Humphrey Yang
influencers.focus: Personal finance, investing basics, money hacks
influencers.sample_content: Index fund vs ETF explainers, beginner investing hacks, cost breakdown reels
influencers.engagement_note: Largest finfluencer by cross-platform reach (54M+ total). Former financial advisor. Brand deals with Ally, WeBull. Strong Gen Z/millennial audience.

influencers.name: Ramit Sethi
influencers.focus: Conscious spending, investing automation, wealth building
influencers.sample_content: Automated investing setups, target-date fund explanations, 'I Will Teach You To Be Rich' branded content
influencers.engagement_note: Expanded into streaming partnerships and premium courses in 2026. Known for data-driven financial advice and no-guilt spending philosophy.

influencers.name: Dave Ramsey
influencers.focus: Debt-free living, mutual funds, retirement planning
influencers.sample_content: Baby Steps framework, growth stock mutual fund recommendations, debt snowball motivation
influencers.engagement_note: Massive legacy following. Prefers mutual funds over ETFs but retirement content overlaps heavily with ETF audiences. High engagement on motivational reels.

influencers.name: Erika Kullberg
influencers.focus: Money-saving hacks, investing, travel hacks, legal tips
influencers.sample_content: Hidden money-saving laws, investment account setup walkthroughs, negotiation scripts
influencers.engagement_note: 21M+ cross-platform. Former corporate lawyer. Viral short-form content style. Strong brand partnership portfolio.

influencers.name: Mark Tilbury
influencers.focus: Dividend investing, retirement planning, wealth building
influencers.sample_content: Dividend ETF breakdowns, compound interest visualizations, retirement portfolio construction guides
influencers.engagement_note: Self-made millionaire and author. Demystifies dividend wealth strategies. Strong appeal to long-term passive investors.

influencers.name: Jaspreet Singh
influencers.sample_content: Why schools don't teach money, index fund investing basics, contrarian financial thinking
influencers.engagement_note: Founder of Minority Mindset platform and Market Briggs newsletter. Challenges traditional financial thinking. Strong entrepreneurial angle.

influencers.name: Vivian Tu
influencers.focus: Investing for millennials/Gen Z, budgeting, Wall Street insights
influencers.sample_content: ETF vs mutual fund comparisons, Roth IRA maxing strategies, beginner brokerage account setup
influencers.engagement_note: Former JP Morgan trader. Relatable Gen Z voice. Frequently breaks down ETF concepts in under 60 seconds. High shareability.

influencers.name: Tori Dunlap
influencers.sample_content: First 100K savings journey, index fund investing for women, financial feminism tips
influencers.engagement_note: Her Financial Feminist brand has 26.9M total cross-platform reach. Saved $100K by age 25. Book author and podcast host. Strong female millennial audience.

influencers.name: Caleb Hammer
influencers.focus: Financial audits, debt intervention, investing education
influencers.sample_content: Financial Audit show clips, real people's portfolio reviews, 'stop buying dumb stuff' motivational content
influencers.engagement_note: Host of Financial Audit YouTube show. Raw, confrontational style drives high engagement. Often recommends index fund/ETF investing as the simple path.

influencers.name: Andrei Jikh
influencers.focus: Dividend investing, crypto, personal finance with magic
influencers.sample_content: Monthly dividend ETF income reports, portfolio transparency posts, magic-themed finance explainers
influencers.engagement_note: 4.3M YouTube subscribers. Known for combining card magic with finance content. Extremely transparent about his own ETF/dividend portfolio holdings.

influencers.name: Tiffany Aliche (The Budgetnista)
influencers.focus: Budgeting, money challenges, wealth building for communities
influencers.sample_content: Live Richer Challenge, savings automations, beginner investing carousels
influencers.engagement_note: NY Times bestselling author. Focus on making finance accessible to underserved communities. Strong community engagement through challenges.

influencers.name: 월급쟁이부자들 (Weolbu)
influencers.focus: 부동산/재테크 교육, ETF 적립식 투자, 월급 관리
influencers.sample_content: 월급으로 ETF 적립식 투자법, 부동산 vs ETF 수익률 비교, 재테크 초보 가이드
influencers.engagement_note: Korea's leading salaried-worker wealth-building community. App + offline education platform. High trust factor among Korean office workers in their 20s-40s.

influencers.name: 부읽남 (Buiknam)
influencers.sample_content: 부동산 경매 팁, 재테크 마인드셋, 투자 서적 리뷰
influencers.engagement_note: Known as 'Jamsil Ajusshi'. Real estate focus with crossover into broader investment education. Book author and content creator.

influencers.name: 슈카 (Syuka)
influencers.focus: 경제 해설, 글로벌 금융, ETF/주식 분석
influencers.sample_content: 미국 ETF 분석, 글로벌 경제 이슈 해설, AI ETF 전망
influencers.engagement_note: Former bond trader (eBest Securities) and fund manager (Samsung Securities). YouTube-primary but growing Instagram. Trusted voice for Korean investors on global markets.

influencers.name: The Investor Korea
influencers.focus: 한국/미국 주식, ETF 뉴스, 투자 교육
influencers.sample_content: 미국 ETF 추천 TOP5, TIGER ETF 분석, 월배당 ETF 비교
influencers.engagement_note: Media-style investment education account. Clean infographic carousels popular with Korean retail investors. Covers both KOSPI and US-listed ETFs.

influencers.name: 플스포 (Plspo)
influencers.focus: 메타인지 투자법, ETF 적립식, 재테크 교육
influencers.sample_content: ETF 적립식 투자 실전기, 메타인지 기반 투자 전략, 재테크 서적 리뷰
influencers.engagement_note: Combined 100K+ followers across platforms. Focus on metacognitive investing approach. Published author on investment strategies.

influencers.name: Graham Stephan
influencers.focus: Real estate, investing, frugal living, financial independence
influencers.sample_content: Real estate vs index fund returns, Roth IRA strategies, frugal millionaire lifestyle
influencers.engagement_note: 5.15M YouTube subscribers. Expanded into real estate education platforms and fintech partnerships in 2026. Multi-million dollar annual revenue from diversified content.

influencers.name: Taylor Price (Pricelesstay)
influencers.focus: Gen Z money education, budgeting, first-time investing
influencers.sample_content: How to start investing with $100, ETF basics for beginners, why your school didn't teach you about money
influencers.engagement_note: Gen Z money mentor who identified lack of financial education in schools. 1.2M TikTok followers. Growing Instagram presence targeting youngest investor demographic.
